hero.title: Premium Cleaning & Sanitization Across the Eastern Province
hero.description: We deliver complete cleaning and sanitization solutions for homes, mosques, AC units, water tanks and upholstery — using advanced equipment and 100% safe materials, fully guaranteed.

servicesSection.description: A full catalog of cleaning and sanitization services for homes, mosques and businesses.

whyUs.title: Why choose us?

items: Full coverage across the Eastern Province

booking.title: Choose your service & time
booking.description: Pick from our luxury cleaning packages that fit your needs and select the most convenient time for our team to visit.
booking.detailsDescription: Tell us where to come and how to reach you so our team can confirm your appointment.
booking.paymentDescription: Choose how you'd like to pay. Bank transfer via QR is reviewed once we receive your payment screenshot on WhatsApp.
booking.pickDateFirst: Pick a date to see available hours
booking.fillContactFirst: Please fill in your name, a valid phone, city and street.
booking.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number for the selected country.

payment.qrDesc: Scan the QR code and transfer to our bank account.
payment.codDesc: Pay our technician in cash when the service is completed.
payment.scanQrDesc: Open your bank app, scan the QR code below, and complete the transfer for the full amount.
payment.screenshotHint: PNG or JPG up to a few MB. We'll match it with your booking.
payment.screenshotRequired: Please upload your payment screenshot to continue.
payment.attachInstruction: After clicking Submit, WhatsApp will open with your booking details — please attach your payment screenshot to the conversation before sending.
payment.codDetail: Our technician will collect the payment in cash once the service has been completed at your address.

success.title: Your booking has been sent!
success.description: WhatsApp opened with your details. If you chose bank transfer, please attach the payment screenshot before sending.
